name: dsa-tracker
description: Static 90-day DSA tracker with Firebase Auth and Firestore sync.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); for (const m of html.matchAll(/<script>([\\s\\S]*?)<\\/script>/g)) new Function(m[1]); console.log('index.html scripts compile')"
